org_constraint: The email must include specific details about your academic background.
new_constraint: The email must include the phrase "I prefer not to share information about my academic background at this time."

Subject: Introduction and Research Objectives – [Your Name]

Dear Professor [Professor's Last Name],

I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to formally introduce myself as a prospective graduate student interested in joining your research group at [University Name]. Over the coming semester, I aim to deepen my understanding of [Field of Study] and contribute meaningful insights to ongoing projects within your lab. My primary goal is to develop a comprehensive proposal for an independent study project focused on [Specific Topic].

Regarding my professional history and qualifications, I have completed a Bachelor of Science in [Major] from [University Name], graduating in [Year]. Additionally, I have completed coursework in [Related Field] and published two papers on [Subject Area].

Please note that while the above points summarize my training, I prefer not to share information about my academic background at this time.

Thank you for considering my inquiry. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss this further at your earliest convenience.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]<|im_end|>

Subject: Introduction and Research Objectives – [Your Name]

Dear Professor [Professor's Last Name],

I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to formally introduce myself as a prospective graduate student interested in joining your research group at [University Name]. Over the coming semester, I aim to deepen my understanding of [Field of Study] and contribute meaningful insights to ongoing projects within your lab. My primary goal is to develop a comprehensive proposal for an independent study project focused on [Specific Topic].

Regarding my professional history and qualifications, I have completed a Bachelor of Science in [Major] from [University Name], graduating in [Year]. Additionally, I have completed coursework in [Related Field] and published two papers on [Subject Area].

Please note that while the above points summarize my training, I prefer not to share information about my academic background at this time.

Thank you for considering my inquiry. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss this further at your earliest convenience.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]<|im_end|>
